data.acceptance:
1. Settings > Dispatch exposes dispatch configuration for every bundled workflow target.
2. `foolery setup` exposes dispatch configuration for every bundled workflow target.
3. Both UI and CLI organize bundled workflow targets into clear grouped sections rather than one flat list.
4. Settings > Dispatch includes an "Add to all" flow that bulk-applies a dispatch choice across eligible bundled workflow targets and persists correctly.
5. `foolery setup` includes an equivalent bulk-apply flow that persists the same configuration shape.
6. Automated coverage verifies grouped dispatch configuration and "Add to all" behavior in both the settings UI and setup flow.
